***CASE IS DISMISSED PER ORDER OF THE COURT.*** REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-13-2012 - NO APPEARANCES AT TRIAL CALL. THE COURT HAD CONTACTED PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TWICE AND COUNSEL REPRESENTED THAT THE CASE HAD SETTLED. THE COURT INSTRUCTED COUNSEL TO FILE A NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT. THERE BEING NO NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT ON FILE BY DAY OF TRIAL AND THERE BEING NO APPEARANCES AT TRIAL CALL, THE COURT ORDERED THIS CASE DISMISSED. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
